canvas.name: Life 30x30 (compound cells, pure primitives inside)
canvas.description: 30x30 toroidal Conway's Game of Life. Each of 900 cells is a `compound Cell_x_y` containing 11 pure primitives (Tick + Switch + ConstantPacket + FanOut + Egress + Aggregator + Filter chain + ConstantSignals). 900 compounds, ~9900 primitive nodes total.
